field.name: NOTES
field.value:
- No Front brakes blanking
- Lap Beacon on LHS

field.name: SETUPCOMMENT
field.value: Low downforce setting for the Race

field.name: NOTES
field.value: Starting tyre set : Pair 1Left and Pair 0 right

field.name: NOTES
field.value: Diff: 60°D/30°B, 10 faces, VC=30Nm, A=10Ta, B=0Tc, Rear Susp = A2-B2-C1-D1. OXTS box fitted.

field.name: NOTES
field.value: Car a bit less US, something feels bent in the front, brakes need to run hotter. (Diff is locked in HS corners)

field.name: NOTES
field.value: Car a bit less US, something feels bent in the front, brakes need to run hotter. (Diff is locked in HS corners)

field.name: NOTES
field.value: Car a bit less US, something feels bent in the front, brakes need to run hotter. (Diff is locked in HS corners)

field.name: NOTES
field.value:
- Starting tyre set :1/0
- No Front brakes blanking
- Lap Beacon on LHS
- Stiff throttle spring
- Change Rr ARB to 14x11

field.name: NOTES
field.value:
- Starting tyre set :1/0
- No Front brakes blanking
- Lap Beacon on LHS
- Stiff throttle spring
- Change Rr ARB to 14x11

field.name: NOTES
field.value:
- Starting tyre set :1/0
- No Front brakes blanking
- Lap Beacon on LHS
- Stiff throttle spring
- Change Rr ARB to 14x11

field.name: NOTES
field.value:
- Starting tyre set :1/0
- No Front brakes blanking
- Lap Beacon on LHS
- Stiff throttle spring
- Change Rr ARB to 14x11

field.name: CUSTOMBALLAST
field.value: <customballast count="2"><ballastentry desc="Gbx" xpos="2.5740" mass="3.1200"/><ballastentry desc="Keel" xpos="0.6490" mass="17.3000"/></customballast>

field.name: NOTES
field.value:
MGU=06, CU=R06 (B+ spec), VCM=15. Diff A = 100Nm. Diff B = 0Nm.
Wheel Rims: F: Mk3, Zircotec coated with inner flange, R: Mk2 Zircotec coated. Rear Spring PL 165.2mm at 3.7kN. RARB = 4mm lashed, connected.

field.name: NOTES
field.value: Local files for Offline correlation only. Rpms MGU increased up to 40000rpm

field.name: NOTES
field.value: MGU=13, CU=R05 (B+ spec), VCM=16. Diff A = 30Nm. Diff B = 0Nm. Wheel Rims: F: Mk4, R: Mk4. Rear Spring PL 165.2mm at 3.7kN. Diffuser low.

field.value: Baseline Setup Car 10 as on Pre-Event Meeting
